discovery.summary: Requirements are locked by the handoff. Carrying in: pressure response replaces Win rate Delta; 6-cell directional pools, 5-cell diagonal baseline, Newcombe diff CI, range-across-pairs cross-model summary, no responsive classification, refusals excluded and footnoted, atomic GraphQL removal of v1 fields, and Feature Factory checkpoints with adversarial reviews before each advance.

parallel_analysis.note: No safe parallel implementation split. Slice A changes the API/schema contract, Slice B depends on regenerated operation/types from that schema, and Slice C depends on those generated types and shared display contract. Keep slices sequential to avoid overlapping generated-file and UI contract edits.
